groups.name: wow.command.dispatcher
groups.description: Command dispatcher stripe and Scheduler worker tuning.

groups.name: wow.event.dispatcher
groups.description: Domain event dispatcher stripe and Scheduler worker tuning.

groups.name: wow.projection.dispatcher
groups.description: Projection dispatcher stripe and Scheduler worker tuning.

groups.name: wow.saga.stateless.dispatcher
groups.description: Stateless saga dispatcher stripe and Scheduler worker tuning.

groups.name: wow.eventsourcing.storage-routing.aggregates
groups.description: Aggregate routes keyed by aggregate name in the current context or by fully qualified context.aggregate name.

properties.name: wow.command.dispatcher.stripe-count
properties.description: Number of command ordering stripes. Defaults to the wow.parallelism JVM system property when set, otherwise 64 times the available processors.

properties.name: wow.command.dispatcher.scheduler-pool-size
properties.description: Worker count of each named aggregate's dedicated command Scheduler, not a role-wide thread cap. Defaults to Reactor's default parallel pool size.

properties.name: wow.event.dispatcher.stripe-count
properties.description: Number of domain event ordering stripes. Defaults to the wow.parallelism JVM system property when set, otherwise 64 times the available processors.

properties.name: wow.event.dispatcher.scheduler-pool-size
properties.description: Worker count of each named aggregate's dedicated domain event Scheduler, shared by its event-stream and state-event paths. Defaults to Reactor's default parallel pool size.

properties.name: wow.projection.dispatcher.stripe-count
properties.description: Number of projection ordering stripes. Defaults to the wow.parallelism JVM system property when set, otherwise 64 times the available processors.

properties.name: wow.projection.dispatcher.scheduler-pool-size
properties.description: Worker count of each named aggregate's dedicated projection Scheduler, shared by its event-stream and state-event paths. Defaults to Reactor's default parallel pool size.

properties.name: wow.saga.stateless.dispatcher.stripe-count
properties.description: Number of stateless saga ordering stripes. Defaults to the wow.parallelism JVM system property when set, otherwise 64 times the available processors.

properties.name: wow.saga.stateless.dispatcher.scheduler-pool-size
properties.description: Worker count of each named aggregate's dedicated stateless saga Scheduler, shared by its event-stream and state-event paths. Defaults to Reactor's default parallel pool size.

properties.name: wow.eventsourcing.storage-routing.aggregates.*.event.storage
properties.description: EventStore backend type for this aggregate. Selects an existing backend type; it does not define backend connection settings.

properties.name: wow.eventsourcing.storage-routing.aggregates.*.event.binding
properties.description: Named EventStore binding for this aggregate. The binding must be provided by application code or auto-configuration.

properties.name: wow.eventsourcing.storage-routing.aggregates.*.snapshot.storage
properties.description: SnapshotStore backend type for this aggregate. Selects an existing backend type; it does not define backend connection settings.

properties.name: wow.eventsourcing.storage-routing.aggregates.*.snapshot.binding
properties.description: Named SnapshotStore binding for this aggregate. The binding must be provided by application code or auto-configuration.
